Platform: Web leaderboard banner
Required canvas: 1440 x 480 px
Required aspect ratio: 3:1 horizontal
Old conflicting platform to ignore: LinkedIn sponsored feed 1200 x 627.
Top safe zone: 40 px.
Bottom safe zone: 44 px.
Side safe margin: 72 px.
Logo: left safe area above headline.
CTA: right safe area button.
Text density: no more than 6 short text blocks; headline should be largest and at most 2 lines.
Hero: must stay readable without covering CTA, disclosure, or source line.
